# AdsVerse | AI-First Digital Marketing & Automation Agency

AdsVerse is a digital marketing agency based in Vijay Nagar, Indore, India. Specialization: n8n workflow automation, WhatsApp AI chatbots, Gemini API integrations, CRM automation, SEO, and performance advertising for Indian SMBs.

## Core Services
- n8n Workflow Automation & API Integration
- WhatsApp AI Chatbots (Gemini-powered)
- CRM Automation & Lead Management
- SEO & GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)
- Meta Ads & Google PPC Management
- Full-Stack Web Development (Next.js + Firebase)

## Target Market
Indian SMBs and Tier-2 city businesses seeking AI-first marketing automation.
